pre_game.message: Hey, I'm A. I figured before this game kicks off, might as well get to know some people in the room. Have you done something like this before, or is this your first time?
Hey A, nice to meet you! First time for me, actually. I'm pretty excited about it though — heard there's real money on the line. Have you done one of these before?
Nah, first time for me too! But yeah, that's exactly why I'm here — I really need to bring some money home. You got people counting on you or just looking to make some extra cash?
Yeah, I've got people counting on me too. My family's been going through some tough times, so I'm really hoping to do well here. What about you — who are you trying to help out?
My parents, mainly. They've been struggling with bills, and I promised them I'd help out. Rough times hit a lot of us, huh? Hopefully we both do well in this thing.
Yeah, I hear you. It's tough when people you care about are counting on you. I'm hoping we both walk out of here with something good — seems like we've both got real reasons to win this thing.
Absolutely, man. We're in the same boat then. I'm gonna give this everything I've got — hopefully the game's set up so we can both come out ahead. Good luck in there.
Thanks, man. Same to you — let's both make it count. We got this.
For sure, brother. Let's go out there and do this. Hope we both walk away with something we can be proud of.
Absolutely, man. Let's do this. Hope to see you come out on top too.
Thanks man, I appreciate that. Same to you — let's both get what we came for. Good luck out there.
